ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "read_code" TEXT /* Read code associated with the disease */,
  "medcode" INTEGER /* Medcode associated with the disease */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code associated with the disease */,
  "icd_version" TEXT /* Version of the ICD code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the disease or diagnosis */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category under which the disease falls */,
  "is_comorbidity" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the disease can be a comorbidity */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Estimated prevalence rate of the disease in the population */,
  "recommended_treatment" TEXT /* Recommended treatment or set of treatments for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's residential address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact phone number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Patient's insurance ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient diagnosed */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the diagnosis (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the diagnosis */,
  "comorbidities" TEXT /* JSON array of comorbid diseases (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_diagnoses_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_diagnoses_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment record */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis associated with the treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment administered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., improved, unchanged, worsened) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who administered the treatment */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the treatment */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES patient_diagnoses ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the provider */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider (e.g., Psychiatry, Psychology) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Provider's practice address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Provider's contact phone number */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Provider's medical license number */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* JSON array of additional certifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient attending the appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider for the appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., consultation, follow-up, therapy session) */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the appointment */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the appointment in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease associated with the history record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Details about the medical history */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the history was recorded */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who recorded the history */,
  "source_of_information" TEXT /* Source of the medical history information (e.g., patient, family member, previous records) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the history has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)
